# Simple demonstration of the callgraph limitation
# This test executes an external program but static analysis can't see this connection

# Step 1: This test executes mcpdiff
exec mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage'

# Step 2: Create a simple Go program that also executes mcpdiff
mkdir -p demo
exec cat > demo/test_runner.go << 'EOF'
package main
import "os/exec"
func main() {
    cmd := exec.Command("mcpdiff", "--help")
    cmd.Run()
}
EOF

# Step 3: If we had callgraph, it would show:
# - The test_runner.go calls exec.Command
# - But NOT that it specifically calls mcpdiff
# - And NOT that this scripttest also calls mcpdiff

# This gap is what our enhanced testcallgraph tool will address:
# Dynamic execution tracking to connect test scripts to the programs they run
